creator: stijn@win.tue.nl
text:
Hi,

On Wed, Mar 07, 2001 at 11:38:51PM +0100, Jimmy Olgeni wrote:
> Hi, did you receive any answer from maintainers yet?
No, unfortunately. I do have another update to the port waiting for the next
xmame to be released; this adds SDL support among other things.

--Stijn

-- 
I wish there was a knob on the TV to turn up the intelligence.
There's a knob called `brightness', but it doesn't work."
		-- Gallagher
